scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @junaadh/aegis typecheck && bun run --filter @junaadh/aegis-server typecheck && bun run --filter @junaadh/aegis-react typecheck
scripts.build: bun run --filter @junaadh/aegis build && bun run --filter @junaadh/aegis-server build && bun run --filter @junaadh/aegis-react build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @junaadh/aegis test && bun run --filter @junaadh/aegis-server test && bun run --filter @junaadh/aegis-react test
